billing_account_id.description: ID of the billing account to which the IAM member will be assigned.

condition.description: Defines a conditional expression for setting IAM policies, specifying under what circumstances the binding is applied. Must include a title, expression, and optional description.

member.description: Specifies the identity to grant the role to, such as a user, group, or service account, in the format `user:email`, `group:email`, or `serviceAccount:email`.

role.description: Specifies the IAM role to assign to the member within the billing account. Must be a predefined role name.
